caption: A man with a beard and short-cropped hair wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt with a small black logo on the left chest. He is positioned in a studio setting against a dark gray, horizontally ribbed acoustic foam wall. A professional condenser microphone is mounted on a shock mount and arm directly in front of him. Across the sequence, the man is speaking or singing into the microphone. In the first frame, his eyes are open and he is looking slightly to the side. In the subsequent frames, he closes his eyes and tilts his head slightly, showing an expression of concentration or emotion. His mouth remains open as he continues to vocalize. A tattoo is partially visible on his right forearm. The camera angle remains static throughout the clip, focusing on his head and shoulders.
